name: Layla Hassan
why: Writing at the intersection of systems biology and public understanding — precise without being reductive.

name: Tariq Osei
why: Runs a fiction lab for underrepresented scientists — uses narrative to reshape what science looks like institutionally.

name: Nina Brecht
why: Studies how institutions shape individual cognition — talks openly about the gap between academic incentives and public good.
notes: Sent a cold LinkedIn note referencing her episode on institutional design.

name: James Okello
why: Made a film about the decline of public lecture culture. Reachable — active contact form on site.
notes: Left a note via contact form. Referenced the Royal Institution angle.

name: Sadia Mirza
why: Writes about what it takes to make science feel local and urgent — not distant and institutional.
notes: Replied to cold DM within 24 hours. Said she'd read more of the project before a call.

name: Rafael Dumont
why: Turned a regional science museum into a civic institution — exactly the model being studied for ASCI.
notes: Third call done. Sharing notes on governance structure next week.
